name: Black Pudding from Scratch (English)
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the bread cubes in a warm oven to soak in the milk. Do not heat the milk beyond blood temperature.
2. In a large bowl, pour the warm milk and soaked bread. Add the cooked barley.
3. Grate the beef suet into the mixture and stir it well with the oatmeal.
4. Season with salt, pepper, and mint.
5. Divide the mixture among 2 or 3 large roasting pans – they should not be more than 3/4 full.
6. Bake in a moderate oven (350°F) for about an hour until thoroughly cooked through.
7. Cool, then cut into squares.
8. Fry in bacon fat or butter until heated through and crisp on the outside. Serve for breakfast or with fried apples and mashed potato for supper.
